initiatives.title: Youth Education Scholarship Program
initiatives.short_description: Supporting underprivileged students with quality education
initiatives.description: A comprehensive scholarship program aimed at providing quality education to underprivileged students across the country. We focus on removing financial barriers to education.

initiatives.title: Fazar Campaign
initiatives.short_description: All the youth (male) around the area mirpr-6 block-A to Block-G will be called at Fazr Time to pray for Fazr in Jamat inside Masjid In sha Allah
